feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Import from Excel not showing the updates in Change Logs
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I recently updated 2 UDF's on Business Partner Master Data through Import From Excel. However, the updates did not show up in the Change Logs of the Business Partners. Instead it is showing that the data version changed. I only updated the 2 UDFs to the value zero (0). Please refer screenshot below-

Can you please help me to understand why its behaving this way. Thanks a lot in advance.

Regards,
Abhishek.

entry.title: Gestión de efectos: Presentación de remesa
entry.content:
Hola a todos!

Tengo un problema con la gestión de efectos. En un usuario en concreto no le aparecen en la ventana de gestión de efectos los mismos efectos en la pestaña presentado o pagado que otros usuarios por lo que no los puede presentar. Los filtros empleados son los mismos.

Creo que no tiene nada que ver con los permisos ya que antes si podía y no tenía problemas y ahora no le aparecen.

¿Alguien tiene alguna idea de por que puede estar ocurriendo esto?

 Cuando lo lleva de creado a presentado, no se ve ya el efecto y tampoco deja pagar el mismo

Gracias, saludos!!

entry.title: Gestion de Bancos/Asistente de Pago, Indicar ejecución de orden de pago
entry.content:
Hola, hemos realizando una operación rutinaria, en Gestion de Bancos/Asistente de Pago, hemos seleccionada todo como siempre (Fecha del pago, fechas de vencimiento para filtrar los movimientos) y en el último paso, donde nos solicita el modo en el que se desea procesar los resultados. Siempre escogemos Indicar ejecución de orden de pago. De esta manera si algo sale mal podemos modificarlo previamente antes de contabilizarlo y no hay que volver atrás movimientos erróneos.

Pero esta vez para nuestra sorpresa tras filtrar los pagos negativos y dejar los proveedores que necesitamos nos ha saltado este error.

“Ejecución de todas las líneas en ejecución de orden de pago fallida. Véase el informe "Transacciones no incluidas"  [Mensaje 504-149]”

Y al darle al menu de Transacciones no incluidas, no ha salido un informe, sino que sale otro error.

“La fecha no está disponible; modifique los criterios de selección y vuelva a introducirlos  [Mensaje 131-85]”

Tras reiniciar servidor incluido y ver que no había solución hemos probado por grupos de clientes y finalmente hemos revisado que La moneda del proveedor coincide a la del banco. Existen suficientes fondos en el banco asignado al pago. El proveedor o socio de negocio está activo. Lo mismo que las Cuentas.

Hemos probado todo igual, excepto que en el paso donde indicamos el modo en el que se desea procesar los resultados. Hemos seleccionado Indicar ejecución de pago. En este caso nos ha realizado la operación y no sabemos por qué. En este caso se ejecutan más pasos como el registro de todas las órdenes, contabilización de los pagos y seguramente más cosas.

No sabemos a que es debido este cambio en el comportamiento del programa y si podemos usar la opción anterior de nuevo. Si alguien sabe mas sobre este punto o puede aclarar algún concepto estaríamos agradecidos.

entry.title: How to connect sap b1 to excel so that I can get live report in my excel
entry.content:
Hello Community,
I want to connect Microsoft Excel or Power BI to SAP B1,
so that I can update my report and view it live on refreshing.
Is it possible?


regards,
Samrat Devkota

entry.title: Duplicate Multiple Rows in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello Team

Quick question. In SAP B1 v10, can multiple rows be duplicated at the same time or does it have to be done individually?

Many thanks.

entry.title: Error updating a difined field
entry.content: When updating a defined field of a user table the system displays an error x, without description

entry.title: Query- special price list of business partners
entry.content:
Hello everyone.
I need your support please with the following query.

When querying the OSPP table it does not give me the correct prices for some items.
What is the table or field that I need to call so that the query shows me the prices after the discount?
I add an image.


Appreciate your help.
Thank you so much.
Greetings.

entry.title: Some authorizers not getting alerts
entry.content:
I have an Purchase Request approval template with 4 authorizers however 2 are getting notifications when a request is made the other 2 used to get alerts but now they nolonger get anything .What can be the issue

#sapbusinessone #sapbusinessonealerts

entry.title: How do I easily obtain the first open posting period through the SAPB1 Service Layer?
entry.content:
Hi there,

I am trying to easily obtain the first open posting period through the SAP B1 Service Layer.

How does one get the most recent open posting period?
I have found the following endpoints:
CompanyService_GetFinancePeriods
CompanyService_GetPeriod
CompanyService_GetFinancePeriod

But I am struggling to see how I can easily get the current / next open postingperiod?

Best regards

entry.title: Production order SAP Business One
entry.content: hello everyone, I want to ask if I get an error when I make a special order for recycling waste and defective materials, when I create a special production, it displays an error (The product has already been defined at a higher level in the product structure [Specification - components - Component code][line: 4] , 'grid line no. 1' [Message 3566-12]

entry.title: B1if can't update translation (MLT1, OMLT)
entry.content:
Hey, 
hope somebody can help me finding the  root cause of my issue. 
I am trying to update translations in SAP via B1iF. 
Adding new translations works without any problems. But as soon as I try to update them, I am getting some errors. 

If i leave the numerator value empty: 

<Payload Role="C" id="atom13" system="0010000241" status="success" b1login="Technical User" method="Synchronous Update" objectid="224" payload="atom14" keyname="TranEntry" keyvalue="58" DIresult="failure" DImsg=" Exception : DI Error: (-2035) This entry already exists in the following tables (ODBC -2035)-The di call #1 did fail."/>

If I insert a numerator: 

Exception : Input values '["58" , "58"]' does not match with expected class names '["com.sap.smb.sbo.api.ICompany" , "java.lang.Integer"]' for SBO object type '224'-The di call #1 did fail."/>

This is the input for the Call: 
<BOM>
<BO>
<AdmInfo>
<Object>224</Object>
<Version>2</Version>
</AdmInfo>
<QueryParams>
<Numerator></Numerator>
</QueryParams>
<MultiLanguageTranslations>
<row>
<TableName>OITM</TableName>
<FieldAlias>ItemName</FieldAlias>
<PrimaryKeyofobject>123456</PrimaryKeyofobject>
</row>
</MultiLanguageTranslations>
<TranslationsInUserLanguages>
<row>
<LanguageCodeOfUserLanguage>8</LanguageCodeOfUserLanguage>
<Translationscontent>New Item Translation</Translationscontent>
</row>
</TranslationsInUserLanguages>
</BO>
</BOM>

 

Many thanks in advance. 
Kind Regards

entry.title: SAP B1 HANA USING INTERNET
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently setting up a VPS with SAP HANA and SAP Business One components. Both components have public IP addresses assigned to them, and I have opened ports 40000, 40020, and 30000 for SAP B1, and ports 30015 and 30013 for the HANA server. However, when I try to connect to the SAP B1 client, I encounter an error stating "database lost." Could you please advise on which ports should be open for public access?

entry.title: How do I display 2 different prices per Item WTQ1 - Inventory Transfer Req
entry.content: I am new to crystal reports and I need to edit the existing Inventory Transfer form showing 2 prices from 2 different pricelist in SAP Business one? One price shows the price from the pricelist indicated from the header and the other pulling from OPLN and ITM1 for the second price per item in the Inventory Transfer Request Document. tnx.

entry.title: SAP Business One DI API has alot of deadlock
entry.content:
Hello

I have problem with SAP Business One 10.00.140 DI API, it has alot of deadlock. My OIGN, OIGE has more than 50 - 100 line and can not lower.

Is there any way to fix it? Is it better if I change to use Service Layer instead of DI API?

entry.title: User Defined Codes
entry.content:
Hi All

Is it possible to change and update User Defined Codes predefined and saved under User Defined Table? 

 

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Service Layer - delete single language - MultiLanguageTranslations (MLT1, OMLT)
entry.content:
I am trying to delete one single language in the MLT1. I only found in the API reference one command, which deletes all language linked to that entity. Is there any possibility to access one line of the MLT1? 
As a Workaround: Currently I just can delete everything and recreate the necessary language. 

DELETE https://localhost:50000/b1s/v1/MultiLanguageTranslations(123)

 For example: Delete the entry for German. 

 

Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: FMS in Item Master Data displays wrong data in Query report
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I encounter the following error when trying to get access tokens for MTD. How do I resolve this error?

Thank you.

entry.title: Substitute Authorizers for Approval Templates
entry.content:
Hi All

Please advise will the Substitute Authorizer be able to receive Message Alert notification in SAP Business One Window Menu->Messager/Alert on customised Query Alert Query as well as Email Notifications on Documents Pending for Approval?  Currently the main Approver in Approver Stage is receiving Message Alert notification in SAP Business One Window Menu->Messager/Alert on customised Query Alert Query as well as Email Notifications on Documents Pending for Approval.

3050040 - Enable Substitute Authorizers for Approval Templates When the Authorizer is Out of Office

Substitute Authorizers for Approval Templates | SAP Help Portal

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: El importe de reconciliación debe ser menor que el saldo vencido para esta operación
entry.content:
Hola a todos!! 

he visto errores similares en otros posts pero no veo una solución que me sirva. Tengo un problema en la gestión de efectos.

Cuando intento pasar a pagado unos efectos desde el cajon de presentación me sale el error "El importe de reconciliación debe ser menor que el saldo vencido para esta operación" y no se a que se debe y como resolverlo. 

Tuve que anular un efecto pagado ya que había usado un fecha incorrecta. No se si esto causa el problema. Por lo general, si pasa esto se cancela y entonces nos deja volver a pagarlos.

¿Alguien sabe que puede estar ocurriendo?

Muchas gracias!!

entry.title: EVOLUTION OF STOCK QUERY
entry.content:
Dear Experts.

I am currently in the mist of trying to develop a query in SAP Business one in the aim to display visibility based on the MRP and forecasts.

what i would like to be able to see is each item stored in the MRP senario is populated in the results across 3 lines and then the next 17 months (a column a month) display the SALES, PURCHASES AND STOCK VALUE an ensample of which i have enclosed below:

Part CodeOverview CategoryPriceItem GroupMarMar-24AprApr-24MayMay-24JunJun-24JulJul-24AugAug-24
TOY ASTOCK10GDX17.00170.0012.00120.0012.00120.0015.00150.0015.00150.0015.00150.00
TOY APURCHASES10GDX0.000.000.000.005.0050.000.000.000.000.000.000.00
TOY ASALES25GDX5.00125.000.000.003.0075.000.000.000.000.000.000.00

i have been playing with some logic ideas however i have been unsuccessful to this point. this is what i managed to come up with to commence my logic :

SELECT
MRP."ItemCode",
MRP."Month",
SUM(Sales."Quantity") AS SalesQuantity,
SUM(Purchases."Quantity") AS PurchasesQuantity,
SUM(Stock."Quantity" * Item."Price") AS StockValue
FROM
"MRP1" MRP
LEFT JOIN
"INV1" Sales ON MRP."ItemCode" = Sales."ItemCode" AND MRP."Month" = MONTH(Sales."DocDate")
LEFT JOIN
"OPOR" Purchases ON MRP."ItemCode" = Purchases."ItemCode" AND MRP."Month" = MONTH(Purchases."DocDate")
LEFT JOIN
"OITW" Stock ON MRP."ItemCode" = Stock."ItemCode" AND MRP."Month" = Stock."Month"
LEFT JOIN
"OITM" Item ON MRP."ItemCode" = Item."ItemCode"
GROUP BY
MRP."ItemCode", MRP."Month"
ORDER BY
MRP."ItemCode", MRP."Month"
Any assistance would be greatly appreciated.
Many thanks
